docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENTE, SAMANTHA AS TO DEFENDANT ROVERSO, ARTURO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DON BALON RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
